name: ntp_check
description: Check NTP time synchronization status and clock drift
command: echo '=== Time Sync ===' && echo "System time: $(date)" && echo "UTC: $(date -u)" && echo "Timezone: $(cat /etc/timezone 2>/dev/null || timedatectl show -p Timezone --value 2>/dev/null)" && echo '' && timedatectl status 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '--- NTP Peers ---' && chronyc sources 2>/dev/null || ntpq -p 2>/dev/null || echo 'No NTP client found (chrony/ntpd)'
